steps.action: Navigate to Timeline & Metrics view with era='All'
steps.expected: 3 metric progression charts visible (Overall, Retrieval, Plausibility Score)
steps.observed: 3 charts visible: Overall Score, Retrieval Score, Plausibility Score. All render correctly with Plotly.

steps.action: Verify Y-axis range is [0,1] on all charts
steps.observed: All 3 charts have yaxis.range=[0,1] confirmed via JavaScript inspection of Plotly layout

steps.action: Verify phase background shading is present and non-overlapping
steps.observed: 8 shading rectangles covering Phases 0-7 (9 phases, Phase 6 has very narrow range). Boundaries: -0.5→24.5, 24.5→49.5, 49.5→79.5, 79.5→293.5, 293.5→357.5, 357.5→358.5, 358.5→403.5, 403.5→467.5. All adjacent, non-overlapping.

steps.action: Verify experiments ordered chronologically by phase (old-era before LME-era)
steps.observed: First experiment: exp_0000 (x=0), last old-era: exp_0259 (x=256), first LME: exp_lme_0000 (x=358), last: exp_lme_0070 (x=428). Old-era before LME-era confirmed.
Chart shows y=0.4630429519731301 at x=366 for exp_lme_0008. results.json: 0.4630429519731301. Exact match.
Chart shows y=0.020986353816341393 for exp_0000. results.json: 0.020986353816341393. Exact match.
Overall: 0.33597732280064924, Retrieval: 0.3588836014926755, Plausibility: 0.5744901021435359. All match results.json exactly.

steps.action: Spot-check exp_0000 retrieval and plausibility scores
steps.observed: Retrieval: 0.021650871203463082, Plausibility: 0.7953839421742998. Both match results.json exactly.

evidence.dataVerification: 5 experiments spot-checked against results.json: exp_lme_0008, exp_0000, exp_lme_0002 (all 3 metrics), exp_lme_0000 (all 3 metrics). All values match exactly.

steps.action: Check for discontinuity indicator at Phase 4/5 boundary
steps.expected: Visible dashed line or annotation at x=293.5
steps.observed: Shape index 8 is a vertical dashed line (type='line', dash='dash', color='#D32F2F', width=2) at x=293.5 spanning full y-domain [0,1]. Present in all 3 metric charts.

steps.action: Verify annotation text explains scoring formula change
steps.expected: Text explaining scores are not directly comparable
steps.observed:
Annotation at x=293.5, y=1 with text: '⚠ Scoring formula change
(scores not directly comparable)'. Always visible (no click/hover required).

steps.action: Verify indicator position between last Phase 4 and first Phase 5 experiment
steps.observed: Phase 4 shading ends at x=293.5, Phase 5 shading starts at x=293.5. Dashed line and annotation placed exactly at this boundary.

steps.action: Check for validation_failed trace in Overall Score chart
steps.expected: Distinct marker trace for validation_failed experiments
steps.observed: Trace named 'validation_failed' exists with mode='markers', symbol='x', color='#D32F2F', size=10. Contains 11 experiments: exp_0004, exp_0163, exp_0259, exp_lme_0032, exp_lme_0054, exp_lme_0056, exp_lme_0058, exp_lme_0063, exp_lme_0066, exp_lme_0067, exp_lme_0070.

steps.action: Verify exp_lme_0063 and exp_lme_0066 appear as distinct markers
steps.expected: Both present as red X markers
steps.observed: exp_lme_0063 at x=421, exp_lme_0066 at x=424. Both in validation_failed trace with red X markers.

steps.action: Verify no line interpolation through validation_failed points
steps.expected: No line trace contains these experiments
steps.observed: Checked all line-mode traces in both 'All' and 'LongMemEval' era views. No line trace contains exp_lme_0063 (x=421) or exp_lme_0066 (x=424). Confirmed excluded from interpolation.

steps.action: Verify same behavior across all 3 metric charts
steps.expected: All charts show validation_failed as red X markers
steps.observed: All 3 charts (Overall, Retrieval, Plausibility) have identical validation_failed trace: symbol='x', color='#D32F2F'. No line traces contain failed experiments.

steps.action: Verify no crash when validation_failed experiments are visible
steps.observed: No console errors detected during any view configuration.

assertions.title: Non-Contiguous Experiment IDs

steps.action: Check if line drawn between exp_lme_0000 (x=358) and exp_lme_0002 (x=360)
steps.expected: No line connecting non-adjacent experiment IDs
steps.observed: Line trace at index 11 (mode='lines') contains x=[358, 360, 361, 362, ...]. Plotly draws a continuous line from (358, 0.037) to (360, 0.336), crossing the x=359 position where exp_lme_0001 would be if it had results.json. There is NO gap in the line.

steps.action: Verify same issue in Retrieval and Plausibility charts
steps.expected: No line in any chart between non-adjacent IDs
steps.observed: Retrieval chart trace at index 11 (lines) also starts with x=[358, 360, 361] — same gap issue. Plausibility chart has the same pattern.

steps.expected: exp_lme_0001 exists but has no results.json
steps.observed: Confirmed: exp_lme_0001 exists in experiments/ but has only params.json + hypothesis.txt, no results.json. It appears nowhere in any chart trace.

evidence.dataDetails: Line trace 11 (Overall Score) contains x=[358, 360, 361, 362, 363, 364, 365, 366, 367, 368] — jumps from x=358 to x=360 without a null/gap break. Plotly renders a line segment between these two points, visually connecting exp_lme_0000 and exp_lme_0002 across the missing x=359 position.

assertions.issues: A line IS drawn between non-adjacent experiment IDs (exp_lme_0000 at x=358 and exp_lme_0002 at x=360). The implementation does not insert null values or break the line trace to create a visual gap at x=359 where exp_lme_0001 is missing. To fix: insert a null/NaN y-value at x=359 in the line traces to create a visible break in the line.

frictions.description: JavaScript eval context persists variable declarations between calls, causing 'Identifier already declared' errors. Worked around by wrapping all code in IIFEs.
frictions.resolution: Used (function(){...})() wrapper for all JavaScript eval calls

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed, 1 failed. VAL-TIMELINE-002 (Metric Progression Line Charts) PASSED: Y-axis [0,1] confirmed, phase shading present and non-overlapping, values match results.json exactly for 5 spot-checked experiments, chronological ordering correct. VAL-TIMELINE-003 (Scoring Discontinuity Indicator) PASSED: Red dashed vertical line at Phase 4/5 boundary (x=293.5) with annotation '⚠ Scoring formula change (scores not directly comparable)' always visible. VAL-TIMELINE-004 (Validation-Failed Experiments in Charts) PASSED: 11 validation_failed experiments shown as red X markers (#D32F2F), excluded from all line traces, no crash. VAL-TIMELINE-005 (Non-Contiguous Experiment IDs) FAILED: Line is drawn between exp_lme_0000 (x=358) and exp_lme_0002 (x=360) without a gap at x=359 for missing exp_lme_0001.
